items.name_en: M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.

Black
Taurillon leather, smooth calfskin half-leather decoration, microfiber lining

5 protective metal studs
Strap: Detachable, adjustable

items.name_en: M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
Gift box packaging may be reasonably adjusted based on stock and may differ from the style shown on the product page; please refer to the actual received packaging style. 5.5 x 5.5 x 5.5 cm (L x H x W)

	•	Strap half-length: 45 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 54 cm

items.name_en: 💝💝Genuine Leather💝💝 M23640 Black M23698 White This OnTheGo East West bag introduces the OnTheGo small tote design, reinterpreting the East West ample silhouette with Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the leather body, and the tidy interior can hold daily essentials. Top handle and detachable leather chain shoulder strap allow for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 25 x 13 x 10cm

This Alma BB handbag embodies the essence of the 1930s Art Deco style, featuring a full-bodied quilted calfskin embroidered Monogram pattern, paired with embossed leather handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for versatile carrying.
Dimensions: 24.5 x 18 x 12 cm

items.name_en: . LTop Grade✨【carryall Handbag】 m13661 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
. LTop Grade✨【carryall Handbag】 m13661 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
The CarryAll Hl Lt small handbag features Monogram canvas and leather trim, serving as a companion for urban life. The ample silhouette features a tidy interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Dimensions: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

items.name_en: Upgraded Version!!!
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Version!!!
Top Grade✨【SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag】M14046 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag infuses the playful Monogram pattern with the dynamic style of the Takashi Murakami edition series, incorporating soft calfskin with reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock.
It easily accommodates daily needs. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with removable stud handles and shoulder straps for flexible carrying.
Dimensions: 23.5x16x8.5cm

items.name_en: Top Grade✨【Nano Diane Baguette Handbag】M14194 White (White Multicolour - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top Grade✨【Nano Diane Baguette Handbag】M14194 White (White Multicolour - Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including the round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
M13078 Multicolore
As a tribute to the City of Light, Paris, the Monogram Multicolore series presents this Alma BB handbag. Monogram Multicolore canvas shapes an Art Deco silhouette, the Louis Vuitton Paris logo appears like a Paris street sign, and the central stripes reiterate classic brand elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm.
